prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small red metal sphere
  - obj_1: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_4: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small brown metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the image and compare distances between pairs.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (small red metal sphere): far right, middle height
- obj_1 (small green rubber sphere): center-right area, lower
- obj_2 (large brown rubber sphere): center-left, middle
- obj_3 (small cyan metal cube): center-front, lower
- obj_4 (large cyan rubber cylinder): center-left, lower
- obj_5 (large cyan metal cylinder): back-left area
- obj_6 (large green rubber sphere): right-center, middle
- obj_7 (small cyan metal cylinder): back-right area
- obj_8 (small brown metal sphere): far left, lower

Now let me estimate distances:

obj_0 to obj_6: red sphere to large green sphere - moderate distance (both on right side)

Let me work through each question:

[qrr_0101] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_1-obj_5: obj_1(small green) to obj_5(large cyan metal cyl) - quite far. obj_0-obj_6 seems moderate. obj_0-obj_6 < obj_1-obj_5: <

[qrr_0102] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_1-obj_7: obj_1 to obj_7(small cyan cyl, back) - moderate-far distance. obj_0-obj_6 similar or less. <

[qrr_0103] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_1-obj_8: obj_1 to obj_8 - across the scene left to right, moderate. obj_0-obj_6 similar. ~=

[qrr_0104] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_2(brown sphere) to obj_3(cyan cube) - moderate distance. obj_0-obj_6 similar. ~=

[qrr_0105] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 to obj_4 - fairly close (both center-left). obj_0-obj_6 >. >

[qrr_0106] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2 to obj_5 - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0107] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2 to obj_7 - moderate distance. ~=

[qrr_0108] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_8: obj_2 to obj_8 - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0109] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3(front) to obj_5(back-left) - large distance. obj_0-obj_6 <. <

[qrr_0110] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3(front-center) to obj_7(back-right) - large distance. <

[qrr_0111] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_8: obj_3 to obj_8 - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0112] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_4(center-left front) to obj_5(back-left) - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0113] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 to obj_7(back-right) - large distance. <

[qrr_0114] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 to obj_8 - small distance. obj_0-obj_6 >. >

[qrr_0115] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 to obj_7 - both in back, close. obj_0-obj_6 >. >

[qrr_0116] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_8: obj_5(back-left) to obj_8(far-left) - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0117] obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_7-obj_8: obj_7(back-right) to obj_8(far-left) - large distance. <

[qrr_0118] obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_2: obj_0(right) to obj_7(back-right) - moderate. obj_1 to obj_2 - moderate. ~=

[qrr_0119] obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_3: obj_0 to obj_7 moderate. obj_1 to obj_3 - small. >

[qrr_0120] obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_4: obj_1 to obj_4 - moderate. ~=
